untranslatable_reason: This arbitrage signal requires multi-market price comparison (bid-ask spreads across venues, price divergence tracking between markets, tick-level persistence detection, and execution timing constraints). The backtest engine only has access to single-market OHLCV data. Critical missing indicators: cross-venue price divergence, bid-ask spread data, tick-level timestamps, and multi-market order book state. The signal cannot be accurately implemented without market microstructure data from multiple venues.
translation_notes: Signal MICROSTRUCTURE_DRY_1_0 is fundamentally incompatible with single-market backtesting. It requires real-time multi-venue data feeds, order book snapshots, and execution latency modeling that exceed standard indicator-based rule capabilities.
